docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AREN SANDEREN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDERSEN, AREN AS TO DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
OVERPAYMENT FOR REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,315.21 FILED BY SANDERSEN, AREN AS TO DEFENDANT MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
